items.name: hooks
items.description: Hooks for PreToolUse, PreCompact, SessionStart, PostToolUse, PostToolUseFailure, Stop, SessionEnd events
items.repo_description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
items.readme_description: Hooks are event-driven automations that fire before or after Claude Code tool executions. They enforce code quality, catch mistakes early, and automate repetitive checks.
items.author: affaan-m
